---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused OpenLoadHub improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: type enhancement, needs triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user problem should this solve?

## Proposed Scope

What should be included in the first version?

## Out Of Scope

What should not be included?

## Notes

Add links, examples, or screenshots if useful. Do not include private data.

## Scope Check

Confirm this request improves an existing public alpha workflow. Dynamic k6 TPS, plugin interfaces, mixed-run UX, enterprise identity, and managed-service requests belong in roadmap discussion, not v0.1 alpha scope.
